content: Order ID 1001: Product A, quantity 50, shipped on 2024-01-10 via Route 1, arrived on 2024-01-12 with 3 hours delay, non-hazardous.
Order ID 1002: Product B, quantity 100, shipped on 2024-01-15 via Route 2, arrived on 2024-01-20 with 24 hours delay, hazardous shipment.
Aviation incident NTSB2 occurred on 2024-02-15 in San Francisco, CA. The aircraft was a Boeing 747, with 2 fatalities and 0 minor injuries. Probable cause: Engine failure due to bird strike.
FDA recall FDA3 dated 2024-03-10: Product C recalled due to contamination. Recall class II with medium severity.
